name: Green Linquine with Four Cheeses
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, heat the ricotta cheese until thinned. Stir constantly with a wooden spoon.
2. Gradually add the remaining cheeses, stirring constantly after each addition until all are melted.
3. Keep stirring and gradually add the milk, 1 tablespoon at a time, ensuring everything is well combined.
4. Maintain the mixture warm over the lowest possible heat setting.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine the hot linguine with reduced-calorie margarine, tossing until the margarine is completely melted.
6. Transfer the linguine to a serving dish and top generously with the cheese sauce.
7. Toss gently to combine and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
